daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events on the Horizon!

top_events.title: Aurora Alert: G1 Storm Predicted
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is predicted on March 13, offering a good viewing opportunity for aurora enthusiasts at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Prepare for aurora viewing if you're located above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Launch: Starlink Group 10-48
top_events.description: SpaceX is set to launch a batch of 29 Starlink satellites, enhancing global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the latest updates.

top_events.title: Long March 8A Launch: Unknown Payload
top_events.description: China's Long March 8A rocket will launch an unknown payload, continuing its space exploration efforts.
top_events.action: Stay tuned for more details on the mission.

alerts.title: Aurora Alert: G1 Storm Predicted
alerts.message: A G1 geomagnetic storm is predicted on March 13, offering a good viewing opportunity for aurora enthusiasts at high latitudes.
alerts.action_required: Prepare for aurora viewing if you're located above 60° latitude.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
